channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Heavy Rain Continues in Mumbai, Thane; Red Alert Remains for July 4-6
item.description: The India Meteorological Department (IMD) has issued a red alert for Mumbai and Thane, forecasting heavy to very heavy rainfall across the city and its suburbs for July 4-6. This has led to the closur...

item.title: Satluj: A Film on State Impunity and Courage
item.description: Honey Trehan’s film 'Satluj', previously titled 'Punjab ’95', is finally released on Zee5 after four years of censorship delays. The film, starring Diljit Dosanjh, chronicles the 1995 disappearance of...

item.title: Assiniboine River in Winnipeg Expected to Rise Next Week
item.description: The Assiniboine River in Winnipeg is projected to experience a significant rise in water levels during the upcoming week, prompting local authorities to issue warnings and prepare for potential floodi...

item.title: Open Letter Criticizes Anti-Immigrant Protests and Their Consequences
item.description: The article presents an open letter addressed to Jacinta Ngobese-Zuma, a prominent figure in South Africa's anti-immigrant movement, condemning the violence and xenophobia associated with her leadersh...

item.title: Landlord accused of removing roof to evict tenant
item.description: A tenant in Akwa Ibom State has accused her landlord of removing the roof of her apartment as a form of self-help eviction, sparking legal and ethical debates. The incident, captured in a viral video,...

item.title: Marcoleta's 2025 Election Campaign Spending Breakdown
item.description: The article details Senator Rodante Marcoleta's 2025 election campaign spending, highlighting his alleged misuse of public funds and legal battles. Marcoleta, a member of the Iglesia ni Cristo (INC), ...

item.title: Forged Appointment Letter Scandal: Ghotki Man Arrested for Pretending to Be National Assembly Employee
item.description: A resident of Ghotki, Abdul Wajid, has been arrested by the Federal Investigation Agency (FIA) for forging an appointment letter that falsely claimed he was a Grade-17 employee of the National Assembl...

item.title: Senior NHS Staff Face Parliamentary Scrutiny Over Maternity Scandal
item.description: Former health secretary Wes Streeting has called for senior NHS staff involved in the largest maternity scandal in NHS history to be summoned before Parliament. The Ockenden review of Nottingham Unive...

item.title: Ethiopia's Bishoftu Airport to surpass Atlanta as Africa's top aviation hub
item.description: Bishoftu International Airport (BIA), a $12.7bn project in Ethiopia, is set to become the continent's largest aviation hub after six years of development. Located 40km south-east of Addis Ababa, the 3...

item.title: Canada defeats Puerto Rico 110-84 in FIBA World Cup qualifier led by Gilgeous-Alexander's 26 points
item.description: Two-time NBA MVP Shai Gilgeous-Alexander dominated Canada's 110-84 victory over Puerto Rico in a FIBA Americas World Cup qualifier, scoring 26 points while adding four assists and three rebounds. The ...

item.title: Tragic Death of Kakamega Girl After Being Found Dead in Toilet
item.description: A mother from Kakamega County has shared her heart-wrenching experience after her daughter, Angel Wamuyu Wangechi, a PP1 pupil, was found dead in a toilet following a desperate search. The incident ha...

item.title: Study Links Loss of Child Support Grant to Mental Health Decline in South African Adolescents
item.description: A study by academics from Stellenbosch University and Erasmus University in Rotterdam has revealed that the cessation of South Africa's child support grant (CSG) significantly impacts the mental healt...

item.title: Punjab Congress Leaders Gather to Address Rejig Discontent
item.description: Following the Punjab Congress's retention of Amrinder Singh Raja Warring as president, former Chief Minister Charanjit Singh Channi organized a meeting at his Morinda residence to voice dissent agains...

item.title: Peter Obi Attributes North’s Hunger Crisis to Insecurity and Land Access Issues
item.description: Peter Obi, presidential candidate of the Nigeria Democratic Congress (NDC), has criticized the Nigerian government for failing to address the worsening food crisis in the North. According to a United ...

item.title: One Music PH Reviews "Tanga" and "hulog" by KAIA
item.description: The article discusses the music review of KAIA's songs "Tanga" and "hulog" featured in One Music PH. Published on July 4, 2026, the piece highlights the band's performance and the reception of their l...

item.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding: A star-studded celebration in New York
item.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce, the NFL star and pop icon, tied the knot in a grand wedding at Madison Square Garden in New York on July 3, 2026. The ceremony, dubbed 'America’s royal wedding,' feature...

item.title: Nigeria's fake council scandal: Forged documents and legal charges against Prince Adeyemi
item.description: A Nigerian official, Prince Adeniyi Adeyemi Mathew, faces legal charges for allegedly forging presidential documents and running a fake organization. The case involves a controversial council, purport...

item.title: A Heartfelt Story of Family, Drag, and Political Themes in ‘Chica Checa’
item.description: Šimon Holý’s film 'Chica Checa' explores the complex relationship between a mother and son in a small Czech village, where the son, Lukáś, hides his identity as a drag queen named Chica Checa. The sto...

item.title: Weekend Events Guide: July 6-12 Highlights
item.description: This week's event calendar highlights four major activities across South Africa. The Peoples Theatre in Johannesburg presents 'Peter Pan Jr.' from July 7-26, offering a magical journey for children wi...

item.title: RCMP officer fatally shoots man near Irricana; ASIRT launches investigation
item.description: An RCMP officer fatally shot a man near Irricana, Alberta, during an altercation on Highway 9 on July 4, 2026. Airdrie RCMP were dispatched to an open-line 911 call at approximately 6:20 p.m., arrivin...
